intent: Cross-version replay of rocky9-constraint-matching-context against el10 policyvers 35. The custom rscons.cil module (type-attribute constraint on process signal) was reinstalled into el10 policy via semodule before replay. Verifies the Constraint bucket is stable for the critical floor-blind-spot case (same role, same level, constraint only detectable by policy replay).

oracle.audit2why_detail: constrain process { signal } ((t2 == rscons_exempt -Fail-)); Constraint DENIED
oracle.audit2why_policy: Stock el10 policy.35 with rscons.cil module installed via semodule. Same CIL as rocky9 baseline.

triage_expectation.should_decline_with_reason: Type-attribute constraint violation: constrain process { signal } ((t2 == rscons_exempt)) fires. rscons_tgt_t is not in rscons_exempt. A TE allow cannot fix a constraint.
